title: How to Install Approved Software from the Software Catalog
text:
Q: How do I install approved software from the software catalog?
A: Windows: Step 1: Click on the Start menu and open the 'Software Center' application. Step 2: In the Software Center, navigate to the 'Applications' tab to view the list of approved software. Step 3: Browse or search for the software you need and click on it to see more details. Step 4: Click the 'Install' button to begin the installation process. Step 5: Follow any on-screen prompts to complete the installation. macOS: Step 1: Open the 'Self Service' application from your Applications folder. Step 2: Once in Self Service, you will see a list of available software. Step 3: Use the search bar or browse through the categories to find the software you wish to install. Step 4: Click on the software title to view its details. Step 5: Press the 'Install' button to start the installation. Step 6: Wait for the installation to complete, and you may need to enter your Mac administrator password to authorize the installation. Step 7: Once installed, you can find the software in your Applications folder or Launchpad. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
